jsonLd.title: Instamojo is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
